falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a bullish trend reversal, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% above the 14-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates extreme buying pressure, disproving the 'HOLD' signal's assumption of market indecision

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above the 3,900 level with a close above 3,920
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a major index breakout, directly contradicting the pattern's implied bearish bias and blowoff score

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
